title: Graph Routing & Conditional Edges
learning_outcomes: Explain conditional routing functions and dynamic edge selection.
Formulate cycle detection and loop controls.

content_sections.title: Conditional Routing and Loop Controls
content_sections.content: Standard edges define static transitions. To build flexible workflows, we use **conditional edges**. A conditional routing function evaluates the current state and returns the next node to execute. This allows the graph to adapt to execution outcomes, executing cycles (loops) until a exit condition is met.
